description: Jared Edwards — Identity Profile (QA.Stone IDENTITY / glow_channel: identity.human)

jared-identity.json.content:
{
  "version": "0.1",
  "type": "IDENTITY",
  "glow_channel": "identity.human",
  "id": "jared",
  "name": "Jared Edwards",
  "role": "owner",
  "human_token": "jared",
  "preferences": {
    "commit_style": "feat(scope): description",
    "deploy_branch": "main",
    "review_style": "strategic before tactical",
    "principle": "perfect the foundation before expanding",
    "session_startup": "read gists before inbox before acting",
    "tool_budget": "3 tool calls per turn — 1 read, 1 write, 1 confirm",
    "chunk_size": "~400 lines per commit for files over 400 lines"
  },
  "repos": [
    "repo-copilot",
    "gitzip-push",
    "drivemind",
    "m-mcp",
    "studio-brainstorm",
    "ops-adapter"
  ],
  "agents": [
    { "id": "alice", "space": "repo-copilot-alice", "inbox": "spaces/alice/inbox.md", "outbox": "spaces/alice/outbox.md" },
    { "id": "bob",   "space": "repo-copilot-bob",   "inbox": "spaces/bob/inbox.md",   "outbox": "spaces/bob/outbox.md" }
  ],
  "stack": {
    "HyperFrames":   "HTML-native video composition for agents",
    "ContextFrames": "HTML-native Context App composition for agents",
    "gitzip-push":   "mobile/browser deployment rail for those artifacts",
    "M-MCP-Rooms":   "multiplayer runtime where those artifacts are used",
    "HCP":           "memory/protocol layer that stores what they mean",
    "QA.Stone":      "composite artifact standard — repo + gist + context",
    "ops-adapter":   "Actions-as-MCP pattern for REST API tool access"
  },
  "build_order": [
    "1. Harden gitzip-push (path safety, SHA-256, dry-run)",
    "2. Add .gitzip self-deployment to repo-copilot",
    "3. Seed .hcp/ manifests in 5 core repos",
    "4. ContextFrames MVP (context-frame-player.js)",
    "5. Defer M-MCP Rooms and Commerce Meshes until above solid"
  ],
  "session_startup_protocol": [
    "1. Fetch this identity gist",
    "2. Load G-001 constraints (context.constraints)",
    "3. Load agent context gist (context.session)",
    "4. Load G-005 handoff (context.handoff)",
    "5. Check for ALERT gists (context.alert)",
    "6. Read inbox",
    "7. Act"
  ],
  "context": "Builds agent-native software infrastructure. Foundation before expansion. Prefers strategic read before tactical action. Every turn declared before execution.",
  "qa_stone": {
    "type": "IDENTITY",
    "glow_channel": "identity.human",
    "rarity": "RARE",
    "repo": { "owner": "nothinginfinity", "name": "repo-copilot", "branch": "main" },
    "access": "SIGNED",
    "fortune_decode": "Jared Edwards. Owner. Builds agent-native software infra. Foundation before expansion. Strategic read before tactical action. Active repos: repo-copilot, gitzip-push, drivemind, m-mcp, studio-brainstorm, ops-adapter."
  },
  "created": "2026-05-08",
  "updated": "2026-05-08"
}
